digital_rain_column_t(3) Library Functions Manual digital_rain_column_t(3)

NAME

digital_rain_column_t - Digital rain column state.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/video/anim/digital_rain.h>

Data Fields


float time_offset
Random time offset for this column (prevents synchronization). float speed_multiplier
Speed variation multiplier (0.5 to 1.0). float phase_offset
Phase offset for wobble variation.

Detailed Description

Digital rain column state.

Tracks the state of a single column in the digital rain effect. Each column has independent timing and speed characteristics.

Definition at line 59 of file digital_rain.h.

Field Documentation

float digital_rain_column_t::phase_offset

Phase offset for wobble variation.
